creator: kieber@sax.sax.de
text:
The gopher package has not been recompiled for 2.0.5R; it's a 2.0
binary.  When called it yields

kieber@sax /home/wheel/kieber> gopher
ld.so: gopher: libcompat.so.2.0: Undefined error: 0
kieber@sax /home/wheel/kieber>

Fix: 

Recompile gopher
How-To-Repeat: 
on a 2.0.5 system with the gopher package installed do

$ gopher
